title: Whimscape x Overworld Mirror
description: Unofficial Whimscape support for Overworld Mirror's portal.
body:
This small patch swaps the Overworld Mirror portal for a Whimscape-themed version.

The original was a yellow recolor of the nether portal, but since it’s meant to be a mirror, I made it sky-blue and more whimscape-y.

Credit [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) and [Overworld Mirror](https://modrinth.com/mod/overworld-mirror)
